title: acer velutinum var. glabrescens
intro: Acer velutinum var. glabrescens, also known as smooth-leafed European maple, is a variety of deciduous maple tree native to Europe. It is a member of the Acer genus and has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and inflammation, due to its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. Acer velutinum var. glabrescens can be prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infused in tea for its health benefits, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
